The '''Arzinian Avatar of Strength''' is an avatar of the [[Arzinian Being of Bordanzan]] that may be fought in the [[Between a Rock...]] quest. It only appears if a player's highest combat stat is [[ranged]], if it is [[melee]] or [[magic]], the [[Arzinian Avatar of Magic|avatar of magic]] or [[Arzinian Avatar of Ranging|ranging]] will appear instead, respectively. However, this is not guaranteed as there is an element of randomness programed into the encounter.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1318461759175467008|date=20 October 2020|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/105704|archivedate=20 October 2020|quote=There's a comment in the code that says "randomize it just a little bit" - looks like it's intentional that you don't always get the [Avatar form] you might expect.}}

Its strength is based on how much [[gold ore]] a player has in their inventory. If fought with 5 or less [[gold ore]], it will have no combat level and possess the ability to infinitely regenerate. If fought with at least 6 ores, it will be level 125, and if fought with 15 or more, it will be level 75.
